question_text: Which statement correctly describes a non-contact force?

options.label: A
options.text: It only works when objects are touching each other

options.label: B
options.text: It can act even when objects are not in direct contact

options.label: C
options.text: It is always weaker than contact forces

options.label: D
options.text: It cannot be measured or detected

explanation: Non-contact forces can act across a distance without the objects touching. Examples include gravity, magnetic forces, and electrostatic forces. These forces can be very strong and are easily measured.
